revision.text:
[[ja:池田神社 (静岡市)]] {{Expand Japanese|池田神社 (静岡市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ikeda Shrine (Q134926975) | native_name = 池田神社 (静岡市) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ikeda Shrine (Q134926975) | coordinates = {{coord|34.981794|138.428765}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Ikeda Shrine'''|池田神社 (静岡市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11668489|ltq=Q11668489|qid=Q11668489|1=List of Shikinaisha in Suruga Province}} ** Series ordinal: 6 ** P155: {{ill|Q111374476|ltq=Q111374476|qid=Q111374476|1=Ikama Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Kusanagi Shrine|lt=Kusanagi Shrine|ja|草薙神社|qid=Q11618229|1=Kusanagi Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q864170|ltq=Q864170|qid=Q864170|1=Suruga Province}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.981794|138.428765}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181552 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県静岡市駿河区池田', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:池田神社 (静岡市)]] {{wikidata link|Q134926975}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Ikeda Shrine |Image = [[File:Ikeda-jinja (Shizuoka), haiden.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Shizuoka City|Q174691|qid=Q174691|1=Shizuoka (city)}}{{ill|lt=Suruga Ward|Q1042630|qid=Q1042630|1=Suruga-ku, Shizuoka}} Ikeda 1207 |Coordinates = {{coord|34|58|54.6|N|138|25|43.7|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q8009611}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}; former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shrine receiving offerings of food and silk|1=UNKNOWN}}) |Founded = |Chief priest = |Main hall = |Other name = |Pilgrimage site = |Annual festival = October 17 |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Ikeda Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|58|54.6|N|138|25|43.7|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|58|54.6|N|138|25|43.7|E}}}} }} '''Ikeda Shrine''' (いけだじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka City|Q174691|qid=Q174691|1=Shizuoka (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Suruga Ward|Q1042630|qid=Q1042630|1=Suruga-ku, Shizuoka}}.[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406075 Ikeda Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines === Overview === It is situated on the northwestern foothills of {{ill|lt=Nihondaira|Q4026928|qid=Q4026928|1=Nihondaira}}, on the south side of the {{ill|lt=Daijihiin River|Q111830290|qid=Q111830290|1=Daijihīn River}}. Although the date of foundation is unknown, it is an ancient shrine identified with a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} of the same name.[https://humizuki.com/omaturi_zanmai/sight/jinja/sizuoka/ikeda.htm Ikeda Shrine] - Omatsuri Zanmai[https://genbu.net/data/suruga/ikeda_title.htm Ikeda Shrine] - Genbushi In the 8th year of the {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} era ({{ill|lt=1875|Q7764|qid=Q7764|1=1875}}), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in Meiji 44 ({{ill|lt=1911|Q2076|qid=Q2076|1=1911}}) it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shrine receiving offerings of food and silk|1=UNKNOWN}}. Ikeda-jinja (Shizuoka), torii.jpg|Torii gate and worship hall === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q8009611}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === {{commonscat|Ikeda-jinja (Shizuoka)}} * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4406075 Ikeda Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ikeda Shrine (Shizuoka)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ikeda Shrine (Shizuoka)]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:駿河区の建築物]] [[Category:駿河区の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Suruga Province]]
